title: Nvidia, Challenged by Apple, Narrowly Retains Wall Street’s Crown
summary: Apple  momentarily edged out  Nvidia  to reclaim its title as the most valuable publicly traded company in the U.S., but by day’s end Nvidia was back on top.  The tech giants flipped back to close the session with Nvidia slightly ahead at a market cap of $4.908 trillion, edging out Apple’s $4.902 trillion.
